title: Migrate DataTools Pro from PHP to Laravel Framework
description:
Complete migration of the DataTools Pro application from raw PHP to the Laravel framework. This is a full-stack migration covering authentication, all application pages, data models, and Salesforce integration.

### Migrated Components

**Infrastructure**
- Local environment with SSL for Salesforce OAuth
- Laravel database migrations for all tables with proper foreign key references
- GitHub repository configuration

**Authentication**
- Salesforce OAuth via Socialite provider library
- Beta passcode security layer
- Refresh token management for ongoing Salesforce API communication

**Dashboard Page**
- Top navigation (Dictionary, Entity Diagram, Metrics, Migration)
- Object multi-select dropdown from Salesforce
- DataTable editor with Laravel controllers
- Object CRUD operations
- User setting-based show/hide toggle

**Object Metadata Page**
- Salesforce metadata retrieval via Laravel HTTP/Guzzle
- DataTable editor with dynamic headers
- Source object management (add, edit, delete)
- Field mapping (source to Salesforce)
- Picklist value management with HandsOnTable
- DDL schema generation
- Migration and reporting status updates
- Calculated formula display

**Metrics Page**
- Metrics CRUD operations
- Taxonomy management (add, edit, assign, remove)
- Offcanvas detail panel
- Alias management with HandsOnTable

**User Settings Page**
- Settings persistence in database
- Session-based settings for page rendering

**Entity Relationship Diagram**
- Full ERD page migration
acceptance_criteria: All application pages render correctly under Laravel
Salesforce OAuth authentication works with Socialite
All CRUD operations function correctly with Laravel controllers
Database migrations create proper schema with foreign keys
DataTable editor integrations work with Laravel routes
middleware_changes: Complete rewrite of all PHP controllers as Laravel controllers. Salesforce API calls migrated to use Laravel HTTP/Guzzle. jQuery DataTable editor PHP controllers replaced with Laravel equivalents.
data_model_changes: Laravel database migrations generated for all tables with proper foreign key references and automatic timestamps.
api_changes: All routes migrated to Laravel routing. API endpoints now use Laravel route conventions.
implementation_notes: Migration was performed page by page: Dashboard (70% first day, 100% next), Object Metadata, Metrics, User Settings, ERD. Salesforce integration uses the socialiteproviders/salesforce package. SSL certificate required locally for Salesforce OAuth. All changes pushed to staging for QA.
comment_summary: Developer migrated the app page by page over approximately one week: Dashboard first, then Object Metadata, Metrics, Settings, and ERD. Each page was migrated incrementally with progress updates. A comprehensive functionality checklist was documented covering all migrated features.
